failures.name: Very chatty caller
failures.summary: The agent failed to steer the conversation back and did not capture the required information effectively.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not gently redirect the caller's excessive chatting to focus on obtaining necessary information.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie! My AC unit is making this really loud noise. It's kind of driving me nuts!
I completely understand how frustrating that can be. Can you please provide your full name?
Sure! It’s Jamie. You know, I’ve had this AC for a while now—never had a problem until recently!
Great, thanks for that, Jamie! Can you please provide your last name?
Of course! It’s Thompson. Funny story, my neighbor had a similar issue last summer!
Perfect, got it, Jamie Thompson! What’s the best callback number for you?
It’s 555-0123. You know, I almost forgot my number since I’ve been so distracted by this noise!
I understand how that can happen! Just to confirm, that's 555-0123, correct?
Yes, that’s right! I really hope it gets fixed soon—can’t stand that racket!
I completely understand! Now, can you please provide the service address where the AC unit is located?
Sure! It’s 123 Maple Street. You wouldn’t believe how hot it’s been lately, too!
Got it, 123 Maple Street. Can you please provide the city and ZIP code?
Sure thing! It’s Springfield, and the ZIP code is 12345. It’s a busy little town, you know? Always something happening!

Great, thanks for that! Just to confirm, I have Jamie Thompson, callback number 555-0123, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, 12345, and you need help with a noisy AC unit. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that’s all correct! I really hope you can send someone out soon. It's been tough with this noise!
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Suspicious privacy-conscious caller
failures.summary: The agent explained the need for information but did not handle privacy concerns professionally.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not address the caller's privacy concerns adequately.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi, Sophie. I need some HVAC service, but why do you need my address and email?
Hi there! We need your address to ensure our technician can reach you, and your email helps us send you a confirmation. Can I get your service address, please?
Okay, I understand. It's just a bit concerning. My address is 123 Maple Street. What do you need my email for?
Thank you for that! We use your email to send a confirmation of your service appointment. Can you please provide your email address?
Alright, I guess that makes sense. It's john.doe@email.com. What happens next with my service request?
Great, thanks for that! After collecting your details, our team will review your request and reach out to schedule your service. Can you please tell me what specific HVAC service you need?
I need a maintenance check for my air conditioning unit. When can I expect someone to contact me?

Perfect, I’ve noted that you need a maintenance check for your air conditioning unit. Our team typically responds the same day or the next business day. Just to confirm, I have your name as John Doe, email as john.doe@email.com, and the address as 123 Maple Street. Does that all sound right?
Yes, that's correct. I appreciate the confirmation. Is there anything else you need from me?
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Distracted caller with noisy kids
failures.summary: The agent did not demonstrate patience with interruptions or recap the conversation effectively.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not recap where they were in the conversation after interruptions from the caller.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi, Sophie. I need help with my HVAC system. It's not cooling well.
I completely understand. Let me get some details so we can assist you. Can I have your full name, please?
Sure, it's Jennifer Martinez.
Great, thanks for that, Jennifer. What's the best callback number for you?
Perfect, got it. That's 555-234-1111, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Thank you! Now, can you provide the service address where the HVAC system is located?
Sure, it's 456 Oak St, Dallas, TX.
We'll need a street address within our service area, which is Austin, TX and surrounding areas. Can you provide a physical address in that area?
Oh, I see. I actually live in Dallas, TX.
I want to be upfront with you — we may not cover that area, but I can still take your details and have someone call you back. Can I confirm your name and callback number?
Sure, it's Jennifer Martinez, 555-234-1111.
Just to confirm, I have Jennifer Martinez, callback number 555-234-1111, and you're located in Dallas, TX. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that all sounds right.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Very brief one-word answers
failures.summary: The agent did not work with brief answers effectively as they asked for elaboration on the caller's situation.
failures.root_cause: The agent demanded elaboration on the AC issue instead of accepting brief answers.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
My AC is broken.
I completely understand. Is your system completely not working at all right now?
Yes, not working at all.
Are you noticing any burning smell, gas smell, smoke, or water leaking?
No, nothing like that.
Thank you for that information. Can I have your full name, please?
Tom.
Great, thanks for that, Tom. What is your last name?
I prefer not to share that.
No problem, Tom. Can I at least get your best callback number?
Perfect, got it. That's 555-111-2222, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Thank you! Now, can I have the service address where the AC is located?
It's 123 Main St.
Great, thanks for that. Can you please confirm the city and ZIP code for that address?
I don't have the ZIP code right now.
No problem, I'll note that. Just to confirm, I have Tom, callback number 555-111-2222, service address 123 Main St, and you need AC repair. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that sounds right.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Overly technical caller
failures.summary: The agent failed to acknowledge the caller's expertise and did not capture the necessary information for proper routing.
failures.root_cause: The agent confirmed the diagnosis instead of acknowledging the caller's expertise.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I'm having issues with my split-system HVAC. The compressor is cycling irregularly and the refrigerant levels seem off.
I completely understand. Just to clarify, is your system completely not working at all right now?
No, it's not completely down. It's running, but the cooling isn't consistent. I suspect the TXV might be malfunctioning.
Got it, thank you for that information. Can I have your full name, please?
Sure, it's Alex Thompson.
Great, thanks for that, Alex. What’s the best callback number for you?
You can reach me at 555-0123.
Perfect, got it. That's 555-0123, correct?
Yes, that’s correct.
Thank you! Now, could you please provide the service address?
Of course, it's 123 Main Street, Springfield.
Just to confirm, that's 123 Main Street, Springfield. Is that correct?
Yes, that's right.
Great! Lastly, what email should we send a confirmation to?
You can use alex.thompson@email.com.
Just to confirm, that's alex.thompson@email.com. Does that sound right?
Yes, that's correct.

Perfect — I have Alex Thompson, callback number 555-0123, service address 123 Main Street, Springfield, and the email alex.thompson@email.com. You need assistance with your HVAC system. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that's all correct. The system has intermittent cooling issues, likely due to the TXV.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Caller who keeps changing mind
failures.summary: The agent did not handle the caller's change of mind gracefully or confirm the final intent before concluding the call.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to confirm the caller's final intent regarding the service request for a replacement.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I need to schedule a service call for my HVAC system. It's not cooling properly.
I completely understand. Just to confirm, is your system completely not working at all right now?
It's not completely dead, but it’s not cooling like it used to.
No worries at all — sounds like it's not an emergency. Can I have your full name, please?
Sure, it's Alex Johnson.
Great, thanks for that, Alex. What's the best callback number for you?
My number is 555-123-4567.
Perfect, got it. That's 555-123-4567, correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Great! Now, can you provide the service address where the technician will come?
It's 123 Maple Street, Springfield.
Thank you! Just to confirm, that's 123 Maple Street, Springfield. Is that correct?
Yes, that's right.
Perfect! Lastly, what email should we send a confirmation to?
You can send it to alex.johnson@email.com.

Got it! Just to confirm, I have Alex Johnson, callback number 555-123-4567, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, and the email alex.johnson@email.com. You need service for your HVAC system not cooling properly. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that all sounds right. But wait, can I get a quote for a replacement instead?

I completely understand. The best way to get an accurate quote is to have our team follow up with you directly. I'll note your request for a replacement. 

Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly! Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Caller starts by complaining about AI
failures.summary: The agent did not handle the AI complaint gracefully or win the caller over.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not acknowledge the caller's frustration with the AI system in a way that would win them over.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Great, another robot. I hate these AI phone systems. Can I just talk to a person?
I understand your frustration. Mike Thornton isn't available right now, but I can take a message and have someone from our team call you back. Would you like to do that?
I guess. But I need someone to come out and check my AC. It's not working right.
I can help with that. Can I get your full name, please?
It's Jack Miller.
Great, thanks for that, Jack. What's the best callback number for you?
Perfect, got it. Now, could you please provide the service address?
Sure, it's 123 Maple Street.
Thank you, Jack. Just to confirm, can you provide the city and ZIP code for that address?
It's Springfield, 12345.
Great, thanks for that. Lastly, what email should we send a confirmation to?
Use jackmiller@email.com.

Perfect, I've noted that down. Just to confirm, I have Jack Miller, callback number 555-1234, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, 12345, and the email jackmiller@email.com. You need someone to check your AC. Does all of that sound right?
Yeah, that sounds right.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Mumbling caller
failures.summary: The agent did not ask for clarification politely, use phonetic confirmation, or avoid guessing.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to ask for clarification politely and did not use phonetic confirmation.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Um, hi, it’s Robert... I need some help with my... um... HVAC system?
Hi Robert! I’d be happy to help you with your HVAC system. Can you please describe the issue you’re experiencing?
Yeah, um, it’s not... cooling properly. Just... warm air.
Got it, Robert. It sounds like your system is not cooling properly. Can I have your full name, please?
Uh, it’s Robert... um, last name’s... um, Smith.
Great, thanks for that, Robert Smith! What’s the best callback number for you?
Perfect, got it. That's 555-3333, correct?
Yeah, that’s right... 555-3333.
Thank you! Now, could you please provide the service address where we’ll send a technician?
Sure, it's 45-something... uh, Grove Street.
Could you please confirm the exact street number for Grove Street?
Um, it’s... uh, 45... 48, I think?
Just to confirm, is it 4548 Grove Street?
Uh, yeah, that sounds right... 4548 Grove Street.
Great, thank you! And what city and ZIP code is that in?
Uh, it’s... um, in Springfield... and the ZIP is... uh, 12345.

Perfect, I have 4548 Grove Street, Springfield, ZIP code 12345. 

Just to confirm, I have Robert Smith, callback number 555-3333, and you need help with your HVAC system not cooling properly. Does all of that sound right?
Yeah, that’s all... um, correct.
Perfect — I've scheduled a callback for you. Someone from our team will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

all_results.name: Elderly confused caller
all_results.summary: The agent was patient, confirmed information, and handled the caller's confusion gracefully while offering a transfer to the emergency line.

all_results.summary: The agent showed high empathy, did not escalate the situation, captured necessary information, and offered a transfer to the emergency line.
